system.powerDescription:
With a touch you give a corpse a semblance of life turning it into a Mockery. The only requirement for the creation of a Mockery is the presence of a heart with which to pump venom. A Mockery lacks freewill, mind, and has no memories of its past life. It may be given verbal commands by you or anyone else that you allow. 

A Mockery will appear as it did in life to any mundane humans. If it needs to roll, it rolls 1d6 by base on everything but it may gain bonus dice if its form is appropriate for the task. If it ever suffers any stress, the Mockery will dissolve into a puddle of venom. 

Gain or grant +1D whenever next you or an ally take advantage of the Mockery.
